description: Comprehensive PgBouncer monitoring dashboard using prometheus-community/pgbouncer_exporter metrics

panels.description: Total clients currently waiting for a server connection. Non-zero = pool pressure.
panels.title: Clients Waiting ⚠️

panels.description: Ratio of active server connections to total pool size across all databases.
panels.title: Server Conn Utilization

panels.description: Longest time any client has been waiting for a server connection. High = pool exhaustion.
panels.title: Max Client Wait ⚠️

panels.description: Total SQL requests pooled by pgbouncer per second.
panels.title: Total Requests (queries) / sec

panels.description: Rate of total time spent executing queries against PostgreSQL.
panels.title: Query Duration Rate (sec/sec)

panels.description: Rate of time connected to PostgreSQL in a transaction (idle-in-txn + executing).
panels.title: Server In-Transaction Time Rate (sec/sec)

panels.description: Rate of total time clients spend waiting for a server. THE key metric for pool saturation.
panels.title: Client Wait Time Rate (sec/sec) ⚠️

panels.description: Average time per query, derived from counters.
panels.title: Avg Query Duration (query_duration / query_count)

panels.description: Average time per transaction, derived from counters.
panels.title: Avg Transaction Duration (xact_time / xact_count)

panels.description: Average time a client waits before its query can be executed.
panels.title: Avg Client Wait per Request (wait_time / queries)

panels.description: Client connections linked to a server connection and able to process queries.
panels.title: Client Active Connections

panels.description: Clients waiting on a server connection. Non-zero = pool saturation.
panels.title: Client Waiting Connections ⚠️

panels.description: Client connections to pgBouncer broken down by application_name and state.
panels.title: Client Connections by Application Name & State

panels.description: Age of the oldest unserved client connection. High values = serious pool exhaustion.
panels.title: Client Max Wait (oldest unserved client) ⚠️

panels.description: Server connections linked to a client and processing queries.
panels.title: Server Active Connections

panels.description: Server connections idle and ready for a client query.
panels.title: Server Idle Connections

panels.description: Server connections idle > server_check_delay, needing server_check_query before reuse.
panels.title: Server Used Connections

panels.description: Server connections currently running server_reset_query or server_check_query.
panels.title: Server Testing Connections

panels.description: Server connections currently logging in to PostgreSQL.
panels.title: Server Login Connections

panels.description: How many client connections share each server connection. Higher = more multiplexing.
panels.title: Client-to-Server Multiplexing Ratio

panels.description: Percentage of server connections actively serving clients vs sitting idle.

targets.expr: sum by (database) (pgbouncer_pools_server_active_connections{job="discovered-internal-storage-pgbouncer", instance=~"$instance", }) / (sum by (database) (pgbouncer_pools_server_active_connections{job="discovered-internal-storage-pgbouncer", instance=~"$instance"} + pgbouncer_pools_server_idle_connections{job="discovered-internal-storage-pgbouncer", instance=~"$instance"}) > 0)

panels.title: Server Pool Utilization (active / (active+idle))

panels.description: Proportion of time waiting vs executing. Values near 1 = severe contention.
panels.title: Wait Time vs Query Time Ratio

title: Storage - PgBouncer Overview
